popularStory.headline: John Ap-Adam, 1st Baron Ap-Adam
popularStory.description:
John Ap-Adam III, 1st Baron Ap-Adam (died May 1311) was created baron by writ in 1299.

The first baron served in the Scottish wars. On July 22,1298, he served in the battle of Falkirk and was knigh …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald ab Adam於大約1242年4月2日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾坡斯托福時，他的父親Lord William Adam III22歲，母親Lady Elizabeth DeGournai0歲。他於1259年與Joan De Knoxville在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1268年6月8日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald ab Adam于大约1242年4月2日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾坡斯托福时，他的父亲Lord William Adam III22岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth DeGournai0岁。他于1259年与Joan De Knoxville在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1268年6月8日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Salvatore, Giuseppe, Santo, Giovanna, Nicola, Aldo, Baldassare, Carmelo, Carmino.
Italian: from the personal name Adamo, the Italian form of Adam .

variants.name: Damo
meanings: Italian: from a shortened form of the personal name   Adamo  .
Hungarian (Damó): from a variant of Domó, a pet form of the personal name Domonkos ‘Dominic’.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald ab Adam was born about 2 April 1242, in Chepstow, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord William Adam III, was 22 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth DeGournai, was 0. He married Joan De Knoxville in 1259, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 8 June 1268, in Charlton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald ab Adam est né environ 2 avril 1242, à Chepstow, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord William Adam III, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth DeGournai, avait 0 ans. Il a épousé Joan De Knoxville en 1259, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1268, à Charlton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald ab Adam um 2. April 1242 in Chepstow, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord William Adam III 22 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth DeGournai 0. Er hat 1259 in Gloucestershire, England Joan De Knoxville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 8. Juni 1268 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Charlton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald ab Adam è nato il circa 2 aprile 1242 nel Chepstow, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord William Adam III, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth DeGournai, aveva 0 anni. Lui sposato Joan De Knoxville nel 1259, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 8 giugno 1268, nel Charlton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald ab Adamが約1242年4月2日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチェプストウで生まれた時，父Lord William Adam IIIは22歳，母Lady Elizabeth DeGournaiは0歳であった。1259年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでJoan De Knoxvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1268年6月8日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチャールトンで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald ab Adam(이)가 대략 1242년 4월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 체프스타우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord William Adam III(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth DeGournai(은)는 0세였다. 그는 1259년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Joan De Knoxville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1268년 6월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 찰턴에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Joan De Knoxville em 1259, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 8 de junho de 1268, em Charlton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald ab Adam родился около 2 апреля 1242 г. в местности чепстоу, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord William Adam III было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth DeGournai, 0. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan De Knoxville в 1259 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 8 июня 1268 г. в местности чарлтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет.
